title: gonystylus othmanii
intro: Gonystylus othmanii, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Borneo, characterized by its large and straight trunks. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonystylus othmanii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's wood and bark are often used to make teas and infusions, while its oil is used in topical applications for its anti-inflammatory and wound-healing properties.
